case_title: MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP. VS. RITA SUNG et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG, RITA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-16-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP. SERVED OCT-30-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG, RITA

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $294.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SUNG, RITA
DECLARATION RE: UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT; COMPUTATION OF INTEREST; NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP C1033(B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNG, RITA $3,583.20 PRINCIPAL, $557.60 INTEREST, $294.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,435.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
